title: DABRCS
description: Do A Barrel Roll Config Sync Plugin for Non-Fabric Servers
body:
# DABRCS

Do A Barrel Roll Config Sync Plugin for Non-Fabric Servers

Do A Barrel Roll Mod:
https://modrinth.com/mod/do-a-barrel-roll

### Usage:
```
/dabrcs <allowThrusting|forceEnabled> <true|false> 
```
Requires OP
